name: cc-enslaver
description: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.12 introduces 圣旨 (Imperial Edicts) — user-defined per-project hard rules loaded from .claude/cc-enslaver/edicts.toml with PreToolUse(Edit|Write|Bash) DENY enforcement and slash-command CRUD. Stop hook block reasons reformatted as uniform 6-row status tables (✅ Pass / ❌ FAIL / ⏸ pending / — n/a) with focused recovery sections. Soft-layer prompts thinned 54% (260 → 120 lines) into high-density keyword tables.
